title: ws.rs GROUP_SEND: no empty-payload check before fan-out
description: BROADCAST (line 646) and SEALED_BROADCAST (line 725) both guard against empty payloads before fan-out with 'payload must not be empty'. GROUP_SEND (line 2044) has no equivalent check. An MLS ciphertext is never zero-length; a zero-length GROUP_SEND triggers MLS decryption failures on every group member. Same amplification risk as empty BROADCAST — one bad frame causes O(members) mpsc pushes. Trigger: client sends GROUP_SEND with empty params.payload. Bad behavior: every group member receives a GROUP_DELIVER with zero-length payload, MLS decrypt fails on all peers.
